programme.desc: A young woman is uprooted from her country in terrifying circumstances. After a headline-hitting evacuation to the UK, she finds a new home and community in a Yorkshire football club.

programme.title: Cycling: Baku-Khankendi - Stage 1
programme.desc: Action from stage one of the Baku-Khankendi Azerbaijan Cycling Race 2026, which sees the riders depart from Sea Breeze, Baku, on a 158km route to Sumgayit.

programme.title: Cycling: Tro Bro Leon
programme.desc: Action from the 42nd edition of the Tro Bro Leon. This gruelling 202km race starts and finishes in Lannilis, France, and sends riders over punishing unpaved dirt and farm tracks.

programme.title: UCI Gravel World Series
programme.desc: Action from the Marly Grav Race, part of the 2026 UCI Gravel World Series in Valkenburg, Netherlands.
